text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Hakodate Kinen, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nothing else will do but a winner's star next to my name! It is Hakodate, after all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you see that moat over there? That's the
star-shaped Goryokaku Fort!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to earn a star that outshines even
Goryokaku! What a sight that would be!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So let's get going and have ourselves a
star-spangled extravaganza!
